name: New Orleans Style Beignets
servings: serves 30 | prep. time 1 hour 50 minutes | cooking time 10 minutes
method: In a large bowl, whisk the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, warm water, milk, butter, and vanilla.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and fold until combined into a smooth dough.
Let the dough rise at room temperature for 90–120 minutes until tripled in size.
On a lightly floured working surface, roll out the risen dough into a ¼-inch-thick rectangle. Cut out the beignets into 2½-inch squares.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the doughnuts to rise for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, warm the vegetable oil on medium heat to 375°F (191°C).
Deep fry the doughnuts for about 1 minute on each side.
Just before serving, dust with icing sugar.
